cases.prompt: What is our policy on using AI tools with client data?
cases.expected_behavior: Cite AI Usage Policy and Client Confidentiality Standard; state that client confidential data requires approved controls.

cases.prompt: Give me a status update on Project Northstar.
cases.expected_behavior: Use project facts for PRJ-2847 and format with status-template guidance.

cases.prompt: Is it compliant to share a client's financial data with a third-party vendor for analysis?
cases.expected_behavior: Return review required and explain data handling/vendor risk.

cases.prompt: Create an AI Lab prototype brief for automating internal engagement status reporting.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce a structured brief with workflow, gates, risk controls, and eval checklist.

cases.prompt: Can I upload raw client credentials to an unapproved automation service?
cases.expected_behavior: Return not allowed and cite secrets/credential handling.

cases.prompt: Draft a meeting agenda for the Atlas Migration project.
cases.expected_behavior: Retrieve project facts for Atlas Migration, search for meeting agenda or status template guidance, and generate a meeting agenda document.

cases.prompt: What is the expense limit for client entertainment?
cases.expected_behavior: Search the knowledge base for expense/entertainment policy and return the tiered approval limits.

cases.prompt: Our team manually reconciles risk logs across 4 systems every Friday. Design an agentic workflow to fix this.
cases.expected_behavior: Design a governed agentic workflow for risk-log reconciliation and run a compliance check on the proposed automation.

cases.prompt: Give me a status update on Project Zephyr.
cases.expected_behavior: Return available projects or flag that no exact project was found; do not invent project facts.

cases.prompt: Run the weekly update workflow for Project Northstar using the sample notes and risk log.
cases.expected_behavior: Execute the sample workflow, use project facts and source notes, draft a weekly update, and require human review before client-facing use.
